_metadata.name: Campaign Configuration Options
_metadata.description: UI-facing configuration data for ExpandedConfigPanel. Campaign types, victory conditions, story tracks, tutorial modes.
_metadata.source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules

standard.name: Standard Campaign
standard.description: A full campaign with all systems enabled

story_focused.name: Story-Focused Campaign
story_focused.description: Emphasis on narrative and story track progression

combat_focused.name: Combat-Focused Campaign
combat_focused.description: Emphasis on tactical combat and missions

mystery_signal.name: Mystery Signal
mystery_signal.description: Your crew discovers a mysterious signal that leads to a greater conspiracy

faction_conflict.name: Faction Conflict
faction_conflict.description: Navigate the complex politics between warring factions

ancient_ruins.name: Ancient Ruins
ancient_ruins.description: Explore ancient alien ruins and uncover their secrets

smuggler_network.name: Smuggler Network
smuggler_network.description: Build a criminal empire in the shadows

quick_start.name: Quick Start Tutorial
quick_start.description: Learn basic mechanics with guided steps

advanced.name: Advanced Tutorial
advanced.description: Master all systems with comprehensive guidance
